title: Live updates: As Iran war expands, U.S. Consulate in Dubai hit by suspected drone strike; 3 embassies close
author: Sammy Westfall, Leo Sands
fullText: U.S. diplomatic outposts in Kuwait, Lebanon and Saudi Arabia were closed on Tuesday as Israel struck Iran and Lebanon and war spread into the fourth day.
summary: U.S. diplomatic outposts in Kuwait, Lebanon and Saudi Arabia were closed on Tuesday as Israel struck Iran and Lebanon and war spread into the fourth day.
